name: fpl-skills
description: Flagship workflow plugin for the ForgePlan ecosystem. 28 engineering skills + dev-advisor agent + 5 hooks. v1.28.1: Sprint Z9 PRD-060 — c4-diagram skill extended with Dispatch mode section (non-interactive invocation from adr-architect Step 5b.1 for ≥3-module full ADRs). v1.28.0: Sprint Z8 PRD-058 — OpenSpec S12 delta-spec mandatory at supersede: /supersede skill + templates/adr-supersede.md + /decay-watch Step 2e supersede chain delta verification (HAS-DELTA / MISSING-DELTA / NO-DELTA-WHEN-REQUIRED). v1.27.0: Sprint Z5 PRD-056 — /decay-watch extended to 4 sources + NOTE-013 deferred-items tracker. v1.26.0: Sprint Z2 PRD-053 — Evidence Decay enforcement. v1.25.0: Sprint Z1 PRD-052 — /decision skill + adr-light.md + adr-full.md templates. v1.24.3: Sprint O PRD-041 — detect_link_footguns.sh.
